# Support Policy

## Getting Help

There are several ways to get help with the Claude Skills Collection:

### 📖 Documentation

First, check our comprehensive documentation:

- [README](../README.md) - Project overview and quick start
- [Quick Start](../docs/QUICK_START.md) - Installation and setup guide
- [Configuration](../docs/CONFIGURATION.md) - Configuration options
- [Examples](../docs/EXAMPLES.md) - Usage examples
- [Skills Reference](../docs/SKILLS.md) - Complete skills reference
- [Security Guide](../docs/SECURITY.md) - Security best practices
- [DevOps Guide](../docs/DEVOPS.md) - DevOps and infrastructure

### 💬 Community

Join our community to get help from other users:

- [Discord](https://discord.gg/) - Chat with other users and contributors
- [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/gauravv-g/claude-skills-collection/discussions) - Ask questions and share ideas
- [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/gauravv-g/claude-skills-collection/issues) - Report bugs and request features

### 📧 Email Support

For enterprise support or security issues:

- **General Support**: [support@example.com](mailto:support@example.com)
- **Security Issues**: [security@example.com](mailto:security@example.com)

## Response Times

| Channel | Response Time |
| ------- | ------------- |
| Discord Community | Best effort |
| GitHub Discussions | 1-3 business days |
| GitHub Issues | 1-3 business days |
| Email Support | 24-48 hours |
| Security Issues | Within 24 hours |

## What We Can Help With

We can help you with:

- Installation and setup issues
- Configuration problems
- Usage questions
- Bug reports
- Feature requests
- Security vulnerabilities

## What We Can't Help With

We cannot help with:

- General programming questions
- Third-party tool issues
- Custom development work
- Consulting services

## Troubleshooting

### Common Issues

#### Installation Fails

1. Check that you have the required dependencies installed
2. Verify your network connection
3. Try clearing your cache
4. Check the [Troubleshooting Guide](../docs/QUICK_START.md#troubleshooting)

#### Skills Not Loading

1. Verify your `settings.json` configuration
2. Check that the skill files exist in `.claude/skills/`
3. Restart Claude Code
4. Check the logs for error messages

#### Performance Issues

1. Check your system resources
2. Reduce the number of active skills
3. Adjust the `effortLevel` in settings
4. Check for background processes

### Getting More Help

If you can't find the answer in our documentation or community:

1. Search existing [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/gauravv-g/claude-skills-collection/issues)
2. Search [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/gauravv-g/claude-skills-collection/discussions)
3. Ask in [Discord](https://discord.gg/)
4. Create a new [GitHub Issue](https://github.com/gauravv-g/claude-skills-collection/issues/new)

## Contributing

We welcome contributions! See our [Contributing Guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for details.

## Enterprise Support

For enterprise support, SLAs, and custom solutions, please contact us at [enterprise@example.com](mailto:enterprise@example.com).

Thanks to our amazing community for helping make this project better!
